hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
if not cmd.startswith('git commit'):
    sys.exit(0)
errors = []
r1 = subprocess.run(['zig', 'fmt', '--check', 'src/'], cwd='libtaijobi', capture_output=True, text=True)
if r1.returncode != 0:
    errors.append('zig fmt failed:\n' + (r1.stdout or r1.stderr).strip())
r2 = subprocess.run(['bunx', 'oxfmt', '--check'], cwd='taijobi-web', capture_output=True, text=True)
if r2.returncode != 0:
    errors.append('oxfmt failed:\n' + (r2.stdout or r2.stderr).strip())
r3 = subprocess.run(['bunx', 'oxlint'], cwd='taijobi-web', capture_output=True, text=True)
if r3.returncode != 0 and 'errors' in r3.stdout and 'Found 0 errors' not in r3.stdout:
    errors.append('oxlint errors:\n' + r3.stdout.strip())
if errors:
    json.dump({'continue': False, 'stopReason': 'Pre-commit checks failed:\n\n' + '\n\n'.join(errors)}, sys.stdout)
"
